violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Kitchen employees was observed touching clothing phones changed tasks including cash register/front counter and then continued to work without washing hands.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with quaternary ammonia was noted in the three compartment sink.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen closest to the front counter.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Front display shelf edges have missing laminate trim edges exposing the absorbant materials below making the shelves not properly sealed.

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): The kitchen employees was noted coughing and returning to work without washing hands. Observed employees wiping hands on clothing touching hair and touching carboard boxes and then proceeding to prep food items.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory noted not present. Due to a new 3 compartment sink installation the second handwash lavatory was removed and still needs to be installed. 1 handwash lavatory located near the pizza assembly area is available but with handwashing practices lacking the installation of the second handwash lavatory must be a priority. A waste receptacle was noted not provided near the hand washing lavatory in the pizza assembly area.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Pizza boxes noted being stored on the floor.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Front display shelf edges have missing laminate trim edges exposing the absorbant materials below making the shelves not properly sealed.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Pop glasses/coffee cups observed not properly stored. Observed soda bottles stored around food prep spaces and food being handled.
